opportunities.description:
[Hiring] UX Research Participants for AversusB.net — 30 min Zoom, $25 Amazon gift card

We're looking for participants for a 30-minute paid UX research session for AversusB (aversusb.net) — a comparison site for products, countries, sports players, tech specs, and more. Compensation: $25 Amazon gift card within 48 hours of completing the session. Requirements: - 18–55 years old - Compared products or brands online in the last 3 months - Comfortable browsing websites - Available for a 30-min Zoom call this week or next week What to expect: You'll browse the site while we watch via screen share
